scripts.dev: npm run generate:logos -- --silent && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run generate:logos && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:app: npm run generate:logos && npm run generate:assets && npm run build:app -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.test: npm test -w shared && npm test -w server && npm test -w web
